categories.name: Mock
categories.description: Define endpoints we expose that the SUT will call

categories.name: Wait
categories.description: Pause test execution until the SUT calls a specific mock endpoint

categories.name: Function
categories.description: Pure data functions with hardcoded outputs

categories.name: EDC Connector
categories.description: Interact with an Eclipse Dataspace Connector (Management API)

categories.name: Digital Twin Registry
categories.description: Interact with an AAS Digital Twin Registry

categories.name: HTTP
categories.description: Send HTTP requests directly or via EDC Dataplane

categories.name: Notification
categories.description: Send and receive Catena-X notifications via EDC Dataplane

categories.name: Validation
categories.description: Validate data against policies and semantic schemas
